company_history_and_story.origin_story: Born out of wonderment, Hey Concrete explores the unlimited fresh possibilities that concrete hides in its imperfections. The brand rebrand industrial concrete into luxurious wall panels that balance artistry and technique, design and engineering.
company_history_and_story.mission_statement: We're here to change your perception about concrete by creating a grey something that evolves with you.
company_history_and_story.manufacturing_process: Each step of the process is done by hand and watched over by attentive eyes. From the very beginning till packaging, a dedicated team takes part in the process of mixing, molding, grinding, selecting and treating the panels before they get to leave the factory.
company_history_and_story.manufacturing_facility_size: India's biggest manufacturing facility (exact sqft shown as animated counter on homepage)
company_history_and_story.product_range_note: Products range from wall panels and wall murals to luxury wash basins and bricks
company_history_and_story.team_description: A team of skilled craftsmen and designers who work together. Supported by state-of-the-art manufacturing techniques and a growing, skilled team of craftsmen.

new_product_category_wash_basins.note: Wash Basins are listed in the navigation menu (About page and footer) as a product and shop category, but the /wash-basins/ page currently returns a 404 error, indicating this category is either upcoming or temporarily unavailable.
mentioned_in: CII GreenPro page product portfolio description

greenpro_certification.global_accreditation: Globally recognized and accredited by the Global Ecolabelling Network (GEN) under GENICES
greenpro_certification.significance: Guarantees that Hey Concrete products meet high sustainability standards and contribute to reducing the environmental footprint throughout the building lifecycle

sustainability_practices: Each panel made by hand minimizing material wastage and power use
sustainability_and_certifications.material_note: H-UHPC (Hey Ultra-High Performance Concrete) - self-developed formulation that synergizes strength, durability, and design sophistication

testimonials.quote_summary: Praised the team for carving their imagination on the primary wall of the VILVAH STORE. Said seeing leaves engraved on concrete exactly as per the drawing was a delight.
Praised design supportive approach, promptness, and dependability. Highlighted availability of prototypes and experimental products. Endorsed their work ethics and products genuinely.
Found Hey Concrete through Instagram for compound wall ideas. Praised customization capability and assistance from design development to execution.
Needed to improve facade without disturbing building structure. Used porous textured concrete panels which enhanced aesthetics exponentially.
Used WRAP panels for office wall with concealed lighting. Said the result looked better than imagination. Praised the product quality.
testimonials.project_type: Office wall with concealed lighting using WRAP panels

value_propositions: Premium Quality with rigorous quality control processes
Extensive Product Range for residential, commercial, industrial needs
PAN India Delivery with widespread distribution network
Experienced Team of engineers, architects and technical experts

working_model: Collaboration at every step from consultation to delivery
Access to continuous innovation and product development

faqs.a: Concrete wall panels are precast concrete elements used in construction for interior and exterior walls. They offer durability, strength, and aesthetic appeal.

faqs.q: What are the advantages of using concrete wall panels?
faqs.a: Fire resistance, noise reduction, thermal insulation, low maintenance, and design versatility.

faqs.q: Are concrete wall panels suitable for both residential and commercial projects?
faqs.a: Yes, they can be used in residential homes, commercial buildings, retail spaces, and more.
Wide range of textures, colors, and finishes to suit different architectural styles.

faqs.q: How are concrete wall panels installed?
faqs.a: By professionals using direct fixing, mechanical fixing, or adhesive bonding depending on project requirements.
Yes, made from natural materials, recyclable at end of lifespan, and contribute to energy efficiency through thermal mass.

faqs.q: What is the lifespan of concrete wall panels?
faqs.a: Several decades with proper maintenance. Resistant to rot, decay, pests, and weathering.

faqs.q: Can concrete wall panels be customized?
faqs.a: Yes, custom sizes, shapes, textures, and finishes are available.
Initial cost may be higher but long-term durability, low maintenance, and energy savings result in cost savings over time.
No special care needed. Regular cleaning with mild detergent and water. Periodic inspections recommended.

faqs.q: Which type of wall panel is best?
faqs.a: The best wall panel depends on aesthetic and functional needs. For a unique, durable, and premium look, concrete wall panels are exceptional. Hey Concrete's H-UHPC panels offer authentic concrete texture in a lightweight, easy-to-install format.

faqs.q: What makes Hey Concrete's premium wall panels unique in India?
faqs.a: Crafted using H-UHPC ensuring strength, durability, and modern design. With 19+ color options and 3 textures, ideal for both interiors and exteriors.

faqs.q: Are your designer wall panels suitable for both homes and commercial projects?
faqs.a: Yes, versatile for homes, offices, showrooms, and large commercial spaces. Zero-maintenance and water-resistant for long-term use.
Yes, Green Pro Certified and sustainable.

faqs.q: What is the best wall cladding option for Indian homes?
faqs.a: Hey Concrete's wall cladding - durable, weather-proof, and a modern alternative to stone and wood finishes.
Yes, both water-resistant and waterproof options available for kitchens, baths, and outdoors.

faqs.q: Do you have fire-proof and termite-proof wall panels?
faqs.a: Yes, Hey Concrete wall panels are fire-proof and termite-proof.
Yes. Sealed for protection, wiped clean with a damp cloth and mild soap.

qa_pairs.question: When was Hey Concrete founded?
qa_pairs.answer: Hey Concrete was founded in 2019.

qa_pairs.question: How many years has Hey Concrete been in the concrete industry?
qa_pairs.answer: Six years, as of 2025/26.

qa_pairs.question: What is Hey Concrete's manufacturing process like?
qa_pairs.answer: Each step is entirely handmade and overseen by attentive eyes. A dedicated team handles mixing, molding, grinding, selecting, and treating panels from start through packaging - all done in-house before products leave the factory.

qa_pairs.question: What is Hey Concrete's brand tagline?
qa_pairs.answer: 'Walls that scream RAWyalty'

qa_pairs.question: Is Hey Concrete's manufacturing facility the largest in India?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the website claims it is India's biggest manufacturing facility, though the exact square footage is displayed only as an animated counter on the homepage.

qa_pairs.question: Does Hey Concrete sell Wash Basins?
qa_pairs.answer: Wash Basins are listed in the navigation menu and footer as a product and shop category on the About page, and mentioned in the CII GreenPro product portfolio. However, the /wash-basins/ URL returns a 404 error, meaning the category is either upcoming or temporarily unavailable.

qa_pairs.question: What is GreenPro certification and who issues it?
qa_pairs.answer: GreenPro is a Type-1 Ecolabel issued by the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII). It is globally recognized and accredited by the Global Ecolabelling Network (GEN) under GENICES. It certifies that Hey Concrete products meet high sustainability standards throughout their building lifecycle.

qa_pairs.question: Which green building rating systems are Hey Concrete products compatible with?
qa_pairs.answer: IGBC, LEED, and GRIHA green building rating systems.

qa_pairs.question: Is international shipping available from Hey Concrete?
qa_pairs.answer: Not yet. Hey Concrete currently ships within PAN India only and states they are exploring international shipping options.

qa_pairs.question: How long does standard delivery take within India?
qa_pairs.answer: Orders ship within 1-2 business days of payment, and delivery takes 9-15 business days across PAN India.

qa_pairs.question: How are shipping charges calculated?
qa_pairs.answer: Based on the weight, dimensions, and shipping address of the order. The estimated cost is shown during checkout.

qa_pairs.question: What should a customer do if their order arrives damaged?
qa_pairs.answer: Contact Hey Concrete within 48 hours of receipt. They will arrange for a replacement or refund.

qa_pairs.question: Can a customer cancel an order after it has been shipped?
qa_pairs.answer: No. Cancellations are not accepted post-shipment. The customer may return the item upon receipt subject to the return policy.

qa_pairs.question: What is the cancellation window before shipment?
qa_pairs.answer: Customers must notify Hey Concrete within 24 hours of placing the order to receive a full refund before shipment.

qa_pairs.question: Within how many days must a refund request be submitted?
qa_pairs.answer: Within 3-5 days of receiving the item.

qa_pairs.question: How long does refund processing take once a return is received?
qa_pairs.answer: 1-2 business days after receipt and verification of eligibility.

qa_pairs.question: Are custom/bespoke orders eligible for refunds?
qa_pairs.answer: Generally not, unless there is a manufacturing defect or an error on Hey Concrete's part.

qa_pairs.question: Are sale items eligible for returns at Hey Concrete?
qa_pairs.answer: No. Sale items are typically final sale and not eligible for returns or refunds.

qa_pairs.question: Who pays for return shipping?
qa_pairs.answer: The customer bears return shipping costs unless the item was damaged or defective due to Hey Concrete's error.

qa_pairs.question: What is the window to report a damaged or defective item?
qa_pairs.answer: Within 24 hours of receipt.

qa_pairs.question: How many authorized partner locations does Hey Concrete have?
qa_pairs.answer: 31 partner locations are listed, covering major Indian cities and one international location in Kathmandu, Nepal.

qa_pairs.question: Does Hey Concrete have any international partner locations?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, one - RUKMANI INTERNATIONAL in Maitidevi, Kathmandu, Nepal (PIN: 44600).

qa_pairs.question: What is the common contact number for all Hey Concrete partner showrooms?
qa_pairs.answer: +91 9251597924. All 31 partner locations share this number.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Hey Concrete partner in Bengaluru?
qa_pairs.answer: Two partners in Bengaluru: MARUTHI CERAMICS (9th C Main Road, #311, 100 Feet Rd, HRBR Layout 1st Block, Banaswadi) and MARUTHI EMPORIA (74/1-2989-C, Mezzanine Floor, Main Road, Indiranagar).

qa_pairs.question: Does Hey Concrete offer a franchise opportunity?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Hey Concrete offers a 'Become a Franchisee' opportunity. They partner with contractors, distributors, and corporate clients. Applications can be submitted via the form at heyconcrete.com/partner-with-us/.

qa_pairs.question: What are the key value propositions for partnering with Hey Concrete?
qa_pairs.answer: Premium Quality, Extensive Product Range, PAN India Delivery, Sustainable Practices, an Experienced Team of engineers and architects, and Tailored Solutions for custom projects.

qa_pairs.question: What are Hey Concrete's two registered design patents?
qa_pairs.answer: Toran (Registration No. 431146-001) and Ridge (Registration No. 431145-001), both registered with The Patent Office, Govt of India.

qa_pairs.question: What 3D file formats can architects download from Hey Concrete's website?
qa_pairs.answer: SKP (SketchUp) and OBJ files. Downloads are confirmed for Serene, Furrow, Toran, and Ridge panels.

qa_pairs.question: What was the VILVAH STORE project about?
qa_pairs.answer: It was a retail store in Coimbatore where Hey Concrete carved custom leaf designs on the primary wall exactly as per the architect Ar. Sabaree Bala's drawing.

qa_pairs.question: Which Hey Concrete product did Dr. Vyom Bolia use and for what purpose?
qa_pairs.answer: Dr. Vyom Bolia of Udaipur used WRAP panels for his office wall to achieve a concealed lighting effect. He stated the result exceeded his imagination and praised the product quality.

qa_pairs.question: What did the client from Tripura (Mr. Arun) use Hey Concrete for?
qa_pairs.answer: Mr. Arun from Tripura used Hey Concrete for compound walls. He discovered the brand through Instagram and praised their customization capability from design development through execution.

qa_pairs.question: What are the official office hours for Hey Concrete?
qa_pairs.answer: Monday to Saturday. Most pages state 10:00-19:00 but the About page states 9:00-19:00. There is a discrepancy in the opening time between pages.

qa_pairs.question: How many projects are showcased in Hey Concrete's portfolio section?
qa_pairs.answer: 11 projects, including Bolia's Residence, Bharat Suhalka's Residence, Fusion Store, The Last Order, Ashirwad Jewellers, and Ramkamal among others.

qa_pairs.question: What does H-UHPC stand for?
qa_pairs.answer: H-UHPC stands for Hey Ultra-High Performance Concrete - a self-developed concrete formulation by Hey Concrete that synergizes strength, durability, and design sophistication.

qa_pairs.question: What is the compressive strength of Hey Concrete Breeze Blocks?
qa_pairs.answer: Greater than 50 MPa.

qa_pairs.question: Why do Hey Concrete Breeze Blocks not suffer from efflorescence (white salt deposits)?
qa_pairs.answer: Because they are made from high-quality white cement and quartz sand, which effectively eliminate efflorescence.

qa_pairs.question: How are Breeze Blocks reinforced against damage during transport?
qa_pairs.answer: They are highly reinforced with glass fiber, providing exceptional strength and minimizing damage during transportation and handling.

qa_pairs.question: What installation methods are used for concrete wall panels?
qa_pairs.answer: Direct fixing, mechanical fixing, or adhesive bonding, depending on project requirements. Installation is done by professionals.

qa_pairs.question: Are Hey Concrete wall panels recyclable?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, they are made from natural materials and can be recycled at the end of their lifespan.

qa_pairs.question: How long do Hey Concrete wall panels last?
qa_pairs.answer: Several decades with proper maintenance. They are resistant to rot, decay, pests, and weathering.

qa_pairs.question: What are the eight key technical properties of Hey Concrete wall panels?
qa_pairs.answer: Strength & Durability, Thin & Lightweight, Weather & UV Resistance, Energy Efficiency & Comfort, High Longevity & Low Life Cycle Cost, Crack Resistance, Fire & Water Resistance, and Chemical & Corrosion Resistance.

qa_pairs.question: What social media platforms is Hey Concrete active on?
qa_pairs.answer: Facebook (facebook.com/heyconcrete), Instagram (instagram.com/heyconcrete), X/Twitter (x.com/hey_concrete), YouTube, and Pinterest.

qa_pairs.question: What is the most-viewed blog post on Hey Concrete's website?
qa_pairs.answer: 'Holi 2026 in Udaipur: Tradition Meets Contemporary Design' with 1,961 views, published February 11, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: Has Hey Concrete raised external funding?
qa_pairs.answer: A YourStory article linked from their blog newsroom references Hey Concrete raising Rs 75 crore to scale sustainable concrete innovation (July 2025).

qa_pairs.question: What blog categories does Hey Concrete maintain?
qa_pairs.answer: Six categories: Blog (general), Breeze Blocks, Brick Claddings, News, Wall Murals, and Wall Panels.

qa_pairs.question: Are cookies required to browse the Hey Concrete website?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, according to the Privacy Policy, the browser must be configured to accept cookies to visit the website.

qa_pairs.question: What personal data does Hey Concrete collect via contact forms?
qa_pairs.answer: Company name, address, contact person, telephone number, fax number, and email address.

qa_pairs.question: Does Hey Concrete share user data with third parties?
qa_pairs.answer: They may share aggregated statistical analysis results with business partners. They may also contract with third parties to provide additional products/services requiring user data. Individual identifiable data is not posted publicly.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Furrow panel's available flute width options?
qa_pairs.answer: 75mm and 150mm flute widths.

qa_pairs.question: What is the inspiration behind the Toran wall panel design?
qa_pairs.answer: The Toran panel is inspired by a verse from the Ramacharitmanas that describes the grandeur of a royal coronation, mentioning flags, banners, Torans (gateway arches), horses, and chariots - symbols of celebration and auspiciousness. It also features a provision for lighting at the base of the arch.

qa_pairs.question: What is the inspiration behind the Ridge wall panel design?
qa_pairs.answer: The Ridge panel is inspired by elevated geological ridge formations with steep-sided shapes, creating a refined and majestic aesthetic.

qa_pairs.question: Which Hey Concrete partner is located in Gurgaon?
qa_pairs.answer: DE CERAMICA at A-511, Sushant Lok Phase 1, Opp. IFFCO Chowk Metro Station, Gurgaon.

qa_pairs.question: Which Hey Concrete partner is located in Ahmedabad?
qa_pairs.answer: LITHOS STUDIO at Shop no. 19 Aryabhoomi near MG Farm, Jodhpur Gham Road, Satellite, Ahmedabad 380015.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a partner for Hey Concrete in Raipur?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, LUXURY SURFACES at Solus Tower, 3rd Floor, Near Puma Showroom, Telibandha, Raipur 492001.

qa_pairs.question: What does Hey Concrete's 'Serene' panel description say about its moisture properties?
qa_pairs.answer: Serene wall panels are described as hygroscopic - naturally absorbing and releasing moisture to ensure a balanced and comfortable indoor climate.
